hero.title: Al Rayyan Al Raqi Company
hero.slogan: For Food Imports and Consumer Goods
hero.description: Food supply and distribution with high standards, verified quality, and lasting trust to efficiently serve the Libyan market.

about.title: About Us
about.description_1: Al Rayyan Al Raqi Company for Food Imports and Consumer Goods operates according to high standards in selecting and supplying products to the Libyan market, ensuring excellent quality and strict quality control.
about.description_2: Our vision is to strengthen local food security by providing a diverse range of products from trusted international sources and distributing them efficiently to ensure they reach consumers in the best possible condition.
